chapter_title.en: Chapter on Forgetfulness in the Two Rakat Prayer of Tawaf

text: 2834 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ أَحَدِهِمَا عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَّ اَلْجَاهِلَ فِي تَرْكِ اَلرَّكْعَتَيْنِ عِنْدَ مَقَامِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِمَنْزِلَةِ اَلنَّاسِي ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2834 - In a narration by Jamil ibn Darraj from one of the Imams (as), it is stated:
"The one who is ignorant in leaving the two Rak'ahs at the Station of Ibrahim (as) is treated as one who forgets."
